# Stage 1 — CCI vocabulary

```{r stage-01-setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("..", "R", "00_atlas_setup.R"))
atlas_env <- require.atlas.checkpoint(0)
```

```{r stage-01}
atlas_env <- run_stage_01_vocab(atlas_env)
assign("atlas_env", atlas_env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
length(atlas_env$J)
```

Review `results/vocab_report.tsv` before continuing.
